stonetop.summary: Roadside predators who lure travelers from the safety of the Roads.

system.concept: Roadside predators who lure travelers from the safety of the Roads.
system.description: The magic of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.eoTIBDMIzJXByPCZ]{Makers}' Roads and the open terrain make a life of banditry far from easy, but somehow they crop up every few years. Might be @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NS2bhYMi23m0eWao]{Hillfolk}, disgraced or desperate — but more often than not, they're scoundrels who'd rather bleed their fellows than scrape by up in @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.HesP5wBhjA0l9Ffk]{Gordin's Delve}. In the lawless @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.apczJSWiu0M5dFrF]{South Manmarch}, where the Roads give no protection, they raid in weaker but more numerous bands (a horde, HP 3, spear or sling d6).
